summary: Iteration 12 - Testing NEW Daily Voice Briefing Feature. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All voice briefing UI elements verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/voice/daily-briefing-audio returns valid audio size (100KB-5MB range for ~60s briefing)
Backend: GET /api/voice/daily-briefing-audio does NOT require authentication (no 401)
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/geopolitical-risk returns 8 regions with global_risk_score
Frontend: Voice briefing banner appears with 'GENERATING...' state on first load (when localStorage empty)
Frontend: Voice briefing banner shows 'READY' state with Play button after ~50s audio load
Frontend: Dismiss (X) button successfully hides/removes the banner
Frontend: Dashboard content loads independently (greeting, portfolio $100.0K, 10 market pulse indicators, 8 risk regions, 8 events, 6 quick actions)
Frontend: Voice briefing only generates once per day (localStorage 'aureos_last_voice_briefing' check)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: daily-briefing-audio endpoint uses GPT-5.2 for script generation + OpenAI TTS (onyx voice) for audio - takes ~30-50 seconds to respond
Backend: Endpoint imports from routes.intelligence module to build context (market pulse, highlights, geopolitical regions, events)
Backend: Returns raw audio/mpeg blob directly, not JSON
Frontend: Voice briefing banner has proper loading/ready states with visual feedback
Frontend: Progress bar shows playback progress
Frontend: localStorage check prevents re-generating briefing on same day
Frontend: Dashboard loads all data (portfolio, market pulse, OSINT risk, events) independently while voice briefing generates in background
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested NEW Daily Voice Briefing feature. GET /api/voice/daily-briefing-audio returns audio/mpeg blob (~1MB for 60s briefing) and does NOT require auth. Takes ~30-50 seconds due to GPT-5.2 script generation + TTS. Frontend has voice-briefing-banner at top of Command Center dashboard with states: GENERATING (loading icon), READY (Play button). Banner has dismiss X button. localStorage key 'aureos_last_voice_briefing' stores today's date string to prevent re-generation on same day. All dashboard features (portfolio, market pulse, OSINT risk, events feed, performance highlights) load independently of voice briefing. Existing narrate-report endpoint still works. All previous iteration features remain functional.

mocked_components.note: NO mocked APIs - all voice features use real GPT-5.2 + OpenAI TTS via Emergent LLM key
real_apis: GET /api/voice/daily-briefing-audio: GPT-5.2 for script + OpenAI TTS (onyx) for audio

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Daily Voice Briefing feature working correctly.
